findings.description: The URL 'https://fintan.jp/page/252/' appears in official_doc_urls but has no basis in the source file. The source only contains nablarch.github.io URLs. This URL was not referenced anywhere in the source xlsx.
findings.source_evidence: Source file contains no reference to fintan.jp. All referenced URLs begin with 'https://nablarch.github.io/docs/5u24/...' or are marked '-'.

findings.description: Section s1 is missing several PascalCase class names, annotation names, and module artifact IDs that appear in its content: 'HttpRequestTestSupport' (class referenced in No.11 via URL), '@Consumes' and '@Valid' (annotations mentioned in No.4 description), 'nablarch-testing' (module in No.11), 'nablarch-fw-messaging-mom' (module in No.8), 'nablarch-messaging-simulator' (module in No.9), 'nablarch-example-web' (module in No.10).
findings.source_evidence: Source No.4: '@Consumesアノテーションと@Validアノテーション'. Source No.8: 'nablarch-fw-messaging-mom 1.0.4'. Source No.9: 'nablarch-messaging-simulator 1.3.0'. Source No.10: 'nablarch-example-web 5u24'. Source No.11 URL path: '.../nablarch/test/core/http/HttpRequestTestSupport.html...', module 'nablarch-testing 1.6.0'.
